title: This Website
description: You're here. This website is made with Astro, Svelte, TailwindCSS and Typescript. I really don't have much more to say about this. Well, maybe apart from the fact I remade it like a billion times because I was never happy with it, this is it's final version though. Unless I decide to remake it again.

title: Room Scheduler
description: This project is my IB DP Computer Science Internal Assessment and is therefore not only very broken, unstable and not suitable for production use, but also something that will most likely never be touched again. It was made with Flutter and Dart.
